mapper.sql: order_id, order_item, do_id, do_item, inventory_id, gather_warehouse_code, modelno, use_qty, qty, do_state, do_state_detail, have_qty, out_qty, wait_type, inventory_type_code, warehouse_code, supplierId, Associate_no, modify_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.order_inventory_view
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.order_inventory_view (order_id, order_item, do_id, do_item, inventory_id, gather_warehouse_code, modelno, use_qty, qty, do_state, do_state_detail, have_qty, out_qty, wait_type, inventory_type_code, warehouse_code, supplierId, Associate_no, modify_time) values (#{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{doItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{gatherWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{doState,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{doStateDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{haveQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{outQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{waitType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{associateNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

order_id,
order_item,

do_state_detail,

out_qty,

Associate_no,
modify_time,

mapper.update:
update dbo.order_inventory_view
order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_id = #{record.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_item = #{record.doItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inventory_id = #{record.inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
gather_warehouse_code = #{record.gatherWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
use_qty = #{record.useQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
do_state = #{record.doState,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_state_detail = #{record.doStateDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
have_qty = #{record.haveQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
out_qty = #{record.outQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
wait_type = #{record.waitType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inventory_type_code = #{record.inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplierId = #{record.supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Associate_no = #{record.associateNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update dbo.order_inventory_view set order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, do_id = #{record.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, do_item = #{record.doItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, inventory_id = #{record.inventoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, gather_warehouse_code = #{record.gatherWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, use_qty = #{record.useQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, do_state = #{record.doState,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, do_state_detail = #{record.doStateDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, have_qty = #{record.haveQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, out_qty = #{record.outQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, wait_type = #{record.waitType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, inventory_type_code = #{record.inventoryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplierId = #{record.supplierid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Associate_no = #{record.associateNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
